example_cases.description: writeProfileFromArtifacts extracts and writes L0/L1/L3 from greenfield artifacts
example_cases.input: { rootDir, artifactsDir: 'specs/', mode: 'greenfield' } with valid discover.json + spec.json + build_report.json + decisions.json
example_cases.expected_output: { layersWritten: ['l0', 'l1', 'l3'], mergeReport: { entitiesAdded: N, entitiesUpdated: 0, conflictsSkipped: 0 } }
example_cases.setup: Create minimal valid artifacts in specs/

example_cases.description: writeProfileFromArtifacts includes L2 when l2_enabled is true
example_cases.input: { rootDir, artifactsDir, mode: 'greenfield' } with l2_enabled: true
example_cases.setup: Create config with l2_enabled: true and artifacts with design_philosophy + decisions

example_cases.description: writeProfileFromArtifacts skips L2 when l2_enabled is false
example_cases.input: { rootDir, artifactsDir, mode: 'greenfield' } with l2_enabled: false
example_cases.expected_output: { layersWritten: ['l0', 'l1', 'l3'] }, l2-decisions.json not created or modified

example_cases.description: writeProfileFromArtifacts merges incrementally with existing profile
example_cases.input: Existing profile with 3 entities in domain model + new artifacts with 2 new entities
example_cases.expected_output: Profile L3 now has 5 entities, mergeReport.entitiesAdded: 2
example_cases.setup: Create existing profile with domain model, then run writer with new artifacts

example_cases.description: writeProfileFromArtifacts works for feature mode (reads from feature dir)
example_cases.expected_output: Profile updated with feature's incremental content

example_cases.description: extractL0 correctly extracts tech stack from discover artifact
extractL2 extracts design philosophy and decision rationale
example_cases.input: discover artifact with design_philosophy[] + decisions.json with decisions[]
example_cases.expected_output: L2 with design_philosophy entries containing principle, justification, source_artifact + architecture_decisions containing decision, rationale, alternatives, source_artifact
example_cases.setup: Create discover.json with philosophy and decisions.json with entries

example_cases.description: mergeDomainModel adds new entities without removing existing ones
example_cases.input: existing: { entities: [{ name: 'User' }] }, incoming: { entities: [{ name: 'Task' }] }
existing: { entities: [{ name: 'User', description: 'original' }] }, incoming: { entities: [{ name: 'User', description: 'different' }] }

example_cases.description: writeProfileFromArtifacts handles missing optional artifacts gracefully
example_cases.input: artifactsDir with discover.json only (no spec.json, no build_report.json, no decisions.json)
example_cases.expected_output: Writes L0 and L3 from discover.json, L1 empty/partial, no error

example_cases.description: writeProfileFromArtifacts throws ARTIFACT_NOT_FOUND when discover.json missing
example_cases.expected_output: Error: ARTIFACT_NOT_FOUND with detail indicating discover.json
example_cases.setup: Create empty artifactsDir with no discover.json

example_cases.description: writeProfileFromArtifacts throws EXTRACTION_FAILED when artifact JSON is malformed
example_cases.input: { rootDir, artifactsDir with discover.json containing invalid JSON }
example_cases.expected_output: Error: EXTRACTION_FAILED with parse error detail

example_cases.description: writeProfileFromArtifacts throws WRITE_ERROR when profile directory is read-only
example_cases.expected_output: Error: WRITE_ERROR with permission denied detail

property_cases.property: For any writeProfileFromArtifacts call, no files under specs/ are created, modified, or deleted
For any writeProfileFromArtifacts call with l2_enabled=false, l2-decisions.json is neither created nor modified, and all other layers are written correctly
